nodes.context: 'Ndrina of Bova Marina, Reggio Calabria, active in international drug trafficking and extortion, with interests in Slovakia.
Colombian cartel with direct contacts to 'Ndrina Vadalà for drug trafficking.
'Ndrina whose capo Francesco Zindato was intercepted with Antonio Vadalà in 2001.
Clan arrested in 2012 operation 'bellu lavuru 2' along with other 'ndrine.
Clan involved in the 2012 operation 'bellu lavuru 2'.
Clan involved in the 2012 operation 'bellu lavuru 2'.

edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero attivi nel traffico internazionale di droga e avrebbero contatti diretti con un cartello colombiano
edges.context: The Vadalà have direct contacts with a Colombian cartel for drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2001 Antonio Vadalà viene intercettato con il capo-'ndrina Francesco Zindato dei Libri - Zindato
edges.context: Antonio Vadalà was intercepted with capo Francesco Zindato of the Libri - Zindato 'ndrina in 2001.

edges.evidence_quote: Vengono arrestati diversi affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano
edges.context: Members of Vadalà and Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti were arrested together in the same operation, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: Vengono arrestati diversi affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano
edges.context: Members of Vadalà and Talia were arrested together in the same operation, indicating cooperation.
